verdict: SUPPORTED — shape=panel_summary, sign matches claim -, |Δ_log|=0.876, ratio=0.416
falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if (a) US aggregate trade-openness 2019-2024 mean is within +/- 2 pp of 2010-2017 mean (rough invariance), AND (b) US merchandise-imports-share-of-GDP shows similar invariance. The composition-shift mechanism is documented qualitatively in the disclosure note. REFUTED if aggregate trade-openness fell substantially (>3 pp), which would suggest tariffs were trade-destroying at the aggregate level.

variables_missing.name: trump_section301_indicator
variables_missing.source: constructed: indicator = 1 for USA from 2018-07 (initial Section 301 wave)
